statement.en: Detection of a Sequence Feature for Recursive Splicing
statement.summary: This package contains Jupyter Notebooks for recursive splicing sequence analysis in order to identify cis- and trans-acting factors associated with recursive splicing regulations and predict recursive splicing site usage.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint describing empirical computational methods (Jupyter notebooks) for analyzing recursive splicing. The work is dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely placeholder or error), not yet peer-reviewed or validated. The core claims about recursive splicing feature detection are not established as proven fact, but the general framework (sequence feature detection, cis/trans factor identification) is grounded in molecular biology. Status is provisional pending validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 再帰的スプライシングは、階層的な配列特性の無限和として自己相似性を持つ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 入れ子状の折り畳みが、スプライスサイト認識の自己言及的なパターン構造を暗示する。
